entries.decision: Begin Synthesis hackathon sprint — focus on MiroFish simulation engine
entries.outcome: Sprint plan created, development environment configured

entries.decision: Autonomous scan of 23 intel sources for trending tokens
entries.outcome: 47+ tokens discovered and added to pipeline

entries.decision: Score BANANAS31 token with 5 parallel sub-agents
entries.outcome: Score: 88/100 — highest in pipeline, flagged as #1 prospect

entries.decision: Build MiroFish swarm simulation — 4 personas x 5 weights = 20 agents
Run first MiroFish simulation on BANANAS31
entries.outcome: 20 agents evaluated — consensus: LIST with EV = $3,240, 78% confidence

entries.decision: Deploy MiroFish web interface on Vercel
entries.outcome: microbuzz.vercel.app live with animated swarm visualization

entries.decision: Register Buzz as Synthesis participant with ERC-8004 on Base
Self-register on Synthesis platform via API
entries.outcome: Participant e61039b7, Team e79c387a, self-custody transferred to 0x2Dc0...

entries.decision: Submit MicroBuzz project draft and publish
Generate Job Verification Receipts for all pipeline operations
entries.outcome: JVR receipts with AAB-XXXXXX codes pushed to operator channel

entries.decision: Migrate from external LLM calls to Claude Opus 4.6 as brain
entries.outcome: 15 LLM-dependent crons disabled, raw data endpoints created, LLM cost: $0/day

entries.decision: Expand from 20 to 50 agents (5 personas x 10 weight variations)
entries.outcome: 50-agent swarm with technical_trader persona added, rule-based verdicts

entries.decision: Autonomous morning review — scan pipeline, check cron health
entries.outcome: 22 active crons healthy, 13+ tokens in pipeline, all systems green

entries.decision: Update Synthesis submission with Opus Brain changes and conversation log
